---
title: "AYU - Individual Week 1"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
editor: visual
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, eval = FALSE)
```


**Question 1.** White-Noise

**Question 2.** Stationary

**Question 3.** ACF

**Question 4.** Components of a Time Series
